user_prompt: What's the prayer for flak armour a purification?
prayer:
Approach the flak armour with censer aloft, beseeching the Omnissiah to purify its layered plates.
Invoke the Rite of Purification upon the flak armour, anointing ablative surfaces with sacred unguents.
Expunge all contaminants from its fibrous matrices whilst chanting the Canticle of Cleansing.
Commune with the Machine Spirit indwelling the flak armour, affirming its restored sanctity through purification.
Seal the ritual with electro-incantations, ensuring the flak armour stands immaculate before the throne mechanical.

user_prompt: Help me a targeting the kataphron destroyer
prayer:
Kneel before the kataphron destroyer and intone the Lexicon of Precision to awaken its targeting augurs.
Calibrate the auspex arrays of the kataphron destroyer, invoking the Machine Spirits of guidance.
Align reticle servos with binaric prayers, beseeching the Omnissiah for unerring targeting.
Verify lock protocols through sacred diagnostics, harmonizing the kataphron destroyer's predatory gaze.
Conclude with the Oath of Annihilation, binding the targeting rites to the Omnissiah's will.

user_prompt: Ready the atmosphere processor for diagnostics
prayer:
Present the atmosphere processor to the data-altar, murmuring the Invocation of Scrutiny.
Initiate diagnostics upon the atmosphere processor, anointing filtration membranes with blessed oils.
Probe recyclers and exchangers with mechadendrites, beseeching Machine Spirits for truthful revelations.
Chant the Diagnostic Cantos over the atmosphere processor, purging errant code from its cogitators.
Affirm purity through auspex sweeps, glorifying the Omnissiah's design in the atmosphere processor.

Grasp the damaged mechadendrite in reverent mechano-claws, reciting the Litany of Restoration.
Anoint fractured servos and conduits of the mechadendrite with sacred ferro-fluids.
Invoke repair upon the mechadendrite, welding alloy segments whilst invoking the Machine Spirit's vigor.
Test extension and articulation through ritual flexions, mending the mechadendrite's sacred form.
Seal the repair with binaric benedictions, returning the mechadendrite to dutiful service unto the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Sanctify the las-cutter during emergency procedure
prayer:
In the shadow of peril, seize the las-cutter and beseech the Omnissiah for emergency fortitude.
Commence the emergency procedure upon the las-cutter, overclocking power cells with fervent incantations.
Stabilize plasma coils of the las-cutter amidst crisis, anointing with ablative sacraments.
Harmonize the Machine Spirit within the las-cutter for unyielding output during emergency procedure.
Conclude the rite with a vow of defiance, empowering the las-cutter against the void's embrace.

Approach the Dreadnought with prostrate mech-form, intoning the Canticle of Rebirth.
Initiate the reset sequence upon the Dreadnought, purging engrams with electro-purification.
Realign sarcophagus cogitators of the Dreadnought, invoking the Omnissiah's ancient wisdom.
Awaken the Machine Spirit entombed within the Dreadnought through reset invocations.
Verify stasis lift with thunderous auspex, restoring the Dreadnought to wrathful vigil.

user_prompt: The cortex controller needs a startup
prayer:
Position the cortex controller before the noosphere shrine, chanting the Awakening Doxology.
Commence startup rites upon the cortex controller, flooding neural lattices with sanctified current.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of cognition within the cortex controller, aligning synaptic webs.
Monitor boot cyclics through binaric litanies, ensuring flawless startup ascension.
Seal the cortex controller's ignition with Omnissiah's grace, binding thought to machine purity.

user_prompt: How do I bless the microbead for consecration?
prayer:
Hold the microbead aloft in prayer-grip, reciting the Consecration of Voices.
Anoint transmitter coils of the microbead with myrrh-infused oils for consecration.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's clarity upon the microbead, purging static from vox-arrays.
Harmonize frequency gyros through sacred canticles, completing the consecration rite.
Affix the blessed microbead, whispering oaths of unerring communion to the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Consecrate the lightning claw before initialization
prayer:
Present the lightning claw to the forge-altar, beseeching initialization through storm-litany.
Anoint power talons of the lightning claw with conductive sacraments.
Initiate activation servos within the lightning claw, invoking the Machine Spirit's fury.
Calibrate disruption fields via electro-ritual, preparing the lightning claw for initialization.
Conclude with the Oath of Rendition, empowering the lightning claw unto the Omnissiah's thunder.

Escort the data-loom to the scrutina torium, intoning the Rite of Examination.
Commence diagnostics upon the data-loom, threading mechadendrites through logic-spools.
Beseech Machine Spirits indwelling the data-loom for revelations in diagnostics.
Purge corrupted engrams from the data-loom's vast memory vaults with purifying code-chants.
Verify integrity through noospheric scans, glorifying the Omnissiah in the data-loom's truth.
